name: SEACOAST BANKING CORP OF FLORIDA
summary: Overview Seacoast Banking Corporation of Florida (Seacoast or the Company) is a financial holding company, incorporated in Florida in 1983, and registered under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the BHC Act). Its principal subsidiary is Seacoast National Bank, a wholly-owned national banking association (Seacoast Bank) chartered in 1926. As of December 31, 2025, Seacoast had total consolidated assets of $20.8 billion, total deposits of $16.3 billion, total consolidated liabilitie...
